positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic lion and a soaring hummingbird, interacting in a dense jungle canopy. The lion is drawn in a regal, slightly minimalist, geometric style with deep golds and warm umber tones. The hummingbird is depicted with jewel-toned emerald, sapphire, and magenta highlights, leaving clean, dynamic, abstract trails of color around it. The composition is centered and circular, framed by stylized tropical leaves and blossoms, creating a strong, balanced silhouette. High contrast black lines define the characters, ensuring optimal visibility on fabric. Clean linework, flat graphic design, vector art aesthetic, pop art influence, jungle core, maximalist flora, symmetry, perfect composition, suitable for screen printing, on a neutral background.
